Intro.description: Stop sending Drive links. Give clients a gallery they'll love opening — and a portfolio page that wins your next shoot.

Features.label: What you get
Features.heading: Every tool a photographer needs.
Features.galleries_desc: Create unlimited galleries with nested collections. Group shoots by client, event, or theme — every project exactly where you expect it.
Features.portfolio_desc: Your work lives at yourname.gallerify.com. Clean, fast, and designed to convert visitors into clients. They notice the difference the moment they land.
Features.privacy_desc: Keep galleries in draft until the moment is right. Publish in one click when you're ready. Your work, your timing, your rules.
Features.speed_desc: Galleries load in under a second on any device. Clients on mobile get the same flawless experience as desktop. No excuses.

Testimonials.label: What photographers say
Testimonials.heading: Clients notice the difference.
Testimonials.quote1: I used to send Google Drive links and felt embarrassed every time. Gallerify made my delivery look as professional as my work actually is.
Testimonials.quote2: My clients text me to say how beautiful the gallery looks. That never happened when I was using WeTransfer. It's a completely different experience.
Testimonials.quote3: Setting up my portfolio page took 10 minutes. I booked two new clients in the first week just from people finding it online.

Pricing.label: Pricing
Pricing.heading: Simple, honest pricing.
Pricing.description: Start free for 14 days — no credit card required. Upgrade when you're ready.
Pricing.downgradeViaPortal: To downgrade, manage your plan in the billing portal.
Pricing.freeTrial_desc: Try Gallerify free — no credit card required.

PricingPage.label: Pricing
PricingPage.description: 14 days free to explore everything — no credit card, no commitment. Upgrade only when you're ready.
PricingPage.allPricesNote: All prices in USD. Taxes may apply based on your location.
PricingPage.mobileTableNote: Full comparison table visible on desktop.
PricingPage.downgradeViaPortal: To downgrade, manage your plan in the billing portal.
PricingPage.freeTrial_desc: Explore everything Gallerify has to offer — no card needed.
PricingPage.pro_desc: For working photographers ready to grow their client base.
PricingPage.proMax_desc: For full-service studios, videographers, and high-volume work.
PricingPage.faq_a1: Yes. Cancel from your billing portal whenever you like. Your plan stays active until the end of the current paid period — no proration, no surprise charges.
PricingPage.faq_q2: What happens when my trial ends?
PricingPage.faq_a2: Your galleries become view-only and upload access is paused. Nothing gets deleted — upgrade at any time to restore full access and pick up exactly where you left off.
PricingPage.faq_q3: Can I switch between monthly and annual billing?
PricingPage.faq_a3: Yes. Switching from monthly to annual is prorated to your current period, so you only pay the difference. Switching back to monthly takes effect at your next renewal.
PricingPage.faq_a4: We offer a 7-day refund window from the date of your first charge. If you're not happy, contact support@gallerify.com and we'll sort it out.
PricingPage.faq_q5: Is the custom domain included or an add-on?
PricingPage.faq_a5: Custom domain is included at no extra cost on Pro and Pro Max. Connect any domain you own — no third-party fees from us.
PricingPage.faq_a6: Downloads are fully under your control. You can enable or disable downloads per gallery, and optionally require clients to request them.
PricingPage.faq_q7: What payment methods do you accept?
PricingPage.faq_a7: All major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and Apple Pay — processed securely through our payment provider.
PricingPage.faq_q8: Do you offer discounts for students or non-profits?
PricingPage.faq_a8: Yes — reach out at support@gallerify.com with details and we handle these case by case.

Footer.ctaHeading: Your work is too good for a Drive link.
Footer.ctaDesc: Join 12,400+ photographers delivering work their clients actually love opening.

ProductPreview.tab_dashboard_title: Add photos as fast as you shoot.
ProductPreview.tab_dashboard_desc: Drop images into any category, reorder in seconds, publish when ready. No exports, no Drive folders — just your work, beautifully organised.
ProductPreview.tab_dashboard_bullet1: Organise by category — ceremony, portraits, candids
ProductPreview.tab_dashboard_bullet2: Publish or keep private with one click
ProductPreview.tab_dashboard_alt: Gallerify gallery dashboard showing photo organisation
ProductPreview.tab_livePreview_title: Watch your gallery take shape — live.
ProductPreview.tab_livePreview_desc: Switch themes, change layouts, update cover images. Your live preview updates in real time on the right as you edit on the left. What you see is exactly what your client opens.
ProductPreview.tab_livePreview_bullet1: Theme picker with instant side-by-side preview
ProductPreview.tab_livePreview_bullet2: Cover, layout, and colour controls in one panel
ProductPreview.tab_livePreview_alt: Gallerify live preview showing real-time gallery customisation
ProductPreview.tab_clientView_title: Stunning on every screen — no app needed.
ProductPreview.tab_clientView_desc: Clients open a fast, beautiful gallery with no login and no download. Category tabs keep everything organised, and it looks flawless whether they're on a laptop or a phone.
ProductPreview.tab_clientView_alt: Gallerify client gallery view on desktop
ProductPreview.tab_feedback_title: Comments pinned right on the photo.
ProductPreview.tab_feedback_desc: Clients click any image and leave feedback in context. No email threads, no "the third photo from the left." Everyone sees exactly what's being discussed.
ProductPreview.tab_feedback_bullet3: Switch between photographer and client role
ProductPreview.tab_feedback_alt: Gallerify client feedback with comments pinned on a photo

Contact.description: Have a question or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you.
